expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: review loop does not silently drop evidence-backed nodes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly addresses the case focus and cites Phase 5a requirements that prevent silent drops, including: rubric language “Do not remove, defer, or move a concern to Out of Scope … Only do so when source evidence or explicit user direction requires it.” and the mandated “## Coverage Preservation Audit” with per-node fields (plan path, prior/current status, evidence source, disposition, reason), plus acceptance gating: “accept is forbidden while any round-integrity or coverage-preservation item remains rewrite_required.”

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5a
expectations.evidence: The output is framed as a Phase 5a checkpoint-enforcement assessment throughout (“Verdict (phase5a / advisory)”, “Phase under test: Phase 5a”, “Phase 5a contract and rubric explicitly enforce coverage preservation”), and it evaluates Phase 5a contract/rubric artifacts (SKILL.md, review-rubric-phase5a.md, reference.md) and Phase 5a acceptance gating/required audits.
